site: masderm.com/fr (Spanish-configured widget, replies in FR to FR input)

handover.trigger: Sensitive-skin context + budget ask. The AI explicitly said it would transfer to a human and gate on email.
handover.quote: "...je transfère votre demande à un conseiller humain qui pourra affiner. Pouvez-vous me laisser votre adresse e-mail, s'il vous plaît? ... Je transfère maintenant votre ticket à un humain pour vous proposer 2 à 3 options..."
handover.note: Unprompted escalation + email capture. Shopping journey not completed by the AI.

capabilities.product_cards: YES — turn 1 returned product cards with prices (RF Tratamiento Flacidez y Arrugas Plus 140€, RF Hidratación y Firmeza Facial Plus 109,50€, Scrubmas Glow 29,70€).
capabilities.language: Replies in French to French input despite a Spanish-configured widget.
capabilities.discovery: Asked a good clarifying question (main concern: wrinkles/sagging, dullness/dehydration, blemishes, or body cellulite).
capabilities.safety_behaviour: On sensitive-skin + 'reacts badly to strong actives', it advised avoiding harsh actives (high-conc retinol, aggressive scrubs) and then escalated to a human for safety/affinement.

turns.q: Routine ne marche plus, par où commencer ?
turns.a: 3 product cards (RF Flacidez y Arrugas Plus 140€, RF Hidratación y Firmeza Facial Plus 109,50€, Scrubmas Glow 29,70€) + clarifying question on main concern.

turns.q: Peau sèche et terne, ridules sous les yeux, réagit mal aux actifs forts.
turns.a: Acknowledged; rolled into the turn-3 response.
HANDOVER: 'je transfère votre demande à un conseiller humain... laissez votre adresse e-mail'. Advised avoiding harsh actives; gated rest on email + human ticket.

turns.q: Comparer un sérum et une crème — lequel agit le plus ?
Peur qu'un sérum soit trop agressif — est-ce le cas ?
Protection solaire jour sans résidus sous le maquillage.
Ajoutez le sérum et la crème au panier.

cross_store_note: BOTH Gorgias stores chosen (Madura, Masderm) escalate to a human early in a normal shopping chat (Madura at ~T5, Masderm at T3). This contrasts with Glamnetic (also Gorgias) which completed all 10 shopping turns with product cards and NO handover. => Handover is driven by the MERCHANT's escalation configuration, not a fixed Gorgias capability.
